job_title: Data Scientist Associate - Data Scientist Sr.
job_nlp_title: Data Scientist Associate - Data Scientist Sr.
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Mining, Data Auditing, Data Aggregation, Data Validation, Data Reconciliation
skill_match_scores: Data Mining:1.0, Data Auditing:0.0, Data Aggregation:1.0, Data Validation:0.0, Data Reconciliation:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelors degree in mathematics, operations research, statistics, economics, data science, computer science or related technical field is required, No additional experience is required for SG 06 Data Scientist Associate, 2 years of relevant work experience is required for SG 07 Data Scientist, 5 years of relevant work experience is required for SG 08 Data Scientist Sr
core_responsibilities: Development of analytical solutions to solve high-value business problems across AEP, Utilize analytical tools and data management skills to provide actionable business intelligence, Build business knowledge across the organization and utilize knowledge to assist in the development of meaningful analyses, Help identify, acquire, and provide management of data needed for various analytic studies, Assist in the development of components of predictive and prescriptive systems to optimize operations and support strategic initiatives, Apply data visualization tools to large data sets to enhance data understanding, Acquire knowledge of business processes and data acquisition practices from business units using disparate systems, Collaborate with technology partners to develop data acquisition and data management practices, Help develop concise meaningful written reports and provide oral presentation of information, reporting dashboards that meet business needs for status, trends, and variances, Collaborate with technology and business units to operationalize meaningful reports and dashboards
job_summary: American Electric Power is a dedicated energy company committed to delivering safe, reliable, and innovative energy solutions. The Data Scientist role involves conducting analyses on various data types to support business decisions, developing analytical solutions, and creating visual dashboards for real-time insights.
